Making a night of it?

Stay the Night

I have two guest rooms available for people who want to stay over. First come, first served — request a room and I'll confirm via email.

⚠️ Only 2 rooms available total. Once both are claimed, requests will be waitlisted. Please don't claim a room unless you're certain you're staying.
